summary:
KEY FUNCTIONALITY: Generates a random checkpoint name.
CORE LOGIC: Calls RandomStringUtils.randomAlphanumeric(8) to generate a random string of 8 alphanumeric characters.
INPUTS/OUTPUTS: None.
DEPENDENCIES: org.apache.commons.lang3.RandomStringUtils.

KEY FUNCTIONALITY:
The SimpleNamingService class is a naming service that simply returns the name it has been initialized with.

CORE LOGIC:
The getNewName() method generates a new checkpoint name by appending the initialized name with the prefix "checkpoint_".

INPUTS/OUTPUTS:
The SimpleNamingService class takes a String name as input in its constructor and returns a String checkpoint name in the getNewName() method.

DEPENDENCIES:
The SimpleNamingService class does not have any dependencies on other classes or packages.
